creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #11)
Maybe, but I wouldn't hold this 5-year old bug open for that reason (especially for qt5 which is nearly eol: https://www.qt.io/blog/qt-5.15-extended-support-for-subscription-license-holders).

If someone wants to do that work to tweak conflicts checking, they can open a review or bug separately (preferably with patches or at least a clear argument that the self check is wrong).
